Description: Design queue jobs with proper retry failed and timeout configuration
Do: Set $tries $backoff $timeout. Implement failed() method. Serialize minimal data
Dont: Serialize entire models or leave jobs without retry/failure handling

Description: Use batches to group related jobs and track overall completion
Do: Dispatch batches for parallel processing. Handle batch completion and failures
Dont: Process items sequentially when they can run in parallel

Description: Chain dependent jobs to execute sequentially in order
Do: Use Bus::chain() for jobs that must run in sequence. Handle chain failures
Dont: Dispatch dependent jobs independently hoping they complete in order

Description: Configure multiple queues with priorities for different job types
Do: Use named queues with priority. Set queue on job class. Configure workers per queue
Dont: Use a single default queue for all jobs

Description: Use Horizon for monitoring and configuring Redis-based queues in production
Do: Configure Horizon for production with proper supervisor settings. Monitor via dashboard
Dont: Run plain queue:work in production without monitoring
Code Bad:
# Production:
php artisan queue:work &
# No monitoring
# No auto-restart on failure
# No metrics or dashboard

Description: Configure Symfony Messenger for async message processing with transports
Do: Define transports and routing. Handle failures with retry strategy. Use stamps for metadata
Dont: Process everything synchronously or configure without failure handling
Code Good:
# config/packages/messenger.yaml
framework:
    messenger:
        transports:
            async:
                dsn: '%env(MESSENGER_TRANSPORT_DSN)%'
                retry_strategy:
                    max_retries: 3
                    delay: 1000
                    multiplier: 2
            failed:
                dsn: 'doctrine://default?queue_name=failed'
        routing:
            'App\Message\SendEmail': async
            'App\Message\ProcessImage': async
            'App\Message\GenerateReport': async
        failure_transport: failed

# Worker command:
# bin/console messenger:consume async --limit=100 --time-limit=3600
Code Bad:
# No retry strategy:
framework:
    messenger:
        transports:
            async:
                dsn: '%env(MESSENGER_TRANSPORT_DSN)%'
        routing:
            'App\Message\*': async
# No failure transport, failed messages lost

Description: Apply rate limiting to queue jobs to avoid overwhelming external services
Do: Use RateLimited middleware or ThrottlesExceptions on jobs that call external APIs
Dont: Dispatch thousands of jobs that hammer external APIs simultaneously

Description: Prevent duplicate jobs from being processed simultaneously
Do: Use ShouldBeUnique on jobs that should not overlap. Use unique IDs based on data
Dont: Dispatch the same job multiple times creating duplicates

Description: Test queue behavior by faking dispatches and asserting job properties
Do: Use Queue::fake() to prevent actual dispatch. Assert job class queue and properties
Dont: Run real queue workers during tests (slow and flaky)

Description: Monitor queue health with metrics and alerts for production reliability
Do: Track queue depth wait times and failure rates. Alert on stuck or growing queues
Dont: Deploy queues without monitoring discovering failures from user reports
